if(NOT DEFINED VENDOR_DIR)
	set(VENDOR_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR})
endif()

set(GLM_INCLUDE_DIR "${VENDOR_DIR}/glm/include")

set(GLFW_INCLUDE_DIR "${VENDOR_DIR}/glfw/include")
set(GLFW_BUILD_DOCS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(GLFW_BUILD_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(GLFW_BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)

set(IMGUI_INCLUDE_DIR "${VENDOR_DIR}/imgui")

set(GLAD_INCLUDE_DIR "${VENDOR_DIR}/glad/include")

set(OPENGL_LIB "opengl32.lib")

if(NOT DEFINED TRACY_INCLUDE_DIR)
	set(TRACY_INCLUDE_DIR "${VENDOR_DIR}/Tracy")
endif()

if(NOT DEFINED ENGINE_INCLUDE_DIR)
	set(ENGINE_INCLUDE_DIR "${VENDOR_DIR}/../Engine/src")
endif()

set(ASSIMP_INCLUDE_DIR "${VENDOR_DIR}/assimp/include")
set(ASSIMP_INJECT_DEBUG_POSTFIX OFF CACHE STRING "" FORCE)
set(ASSIMP_BUILD_TESTS OFF CACHE STRING "" FORCE)
set(ASSIMP_INSTALL OFF CACHE STRING "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS OFF CACHE STRING "" FORCE)

set(GTEST_INCLUDE_DIR "${VENDOR_DIR}/gtest/include")

set(BULLET_INCLUDE_DIR "${VENDOR_DIR}/bullet3/include")
set(BULLET_LIB_DIR "${VENDOR_DIR}/bullet3/lib/${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}")
set(BULLET_COLLISION_LIB "${BULLET_LIB_DIR}/BulletCollision.lib")
set(BULLET_DYNAMICS_LIB "${BULLET_LIB_DIR}/BulletDynamics.lib")
set(BULLET_MATH_LIB "${BULLET_LIB_DIR}/LinearMath.lib")

set(VULKAN_DIR "${VENDOR_DIR}/vulkan/1.3.250.1")
set(VULKAN_INCLUDE_DIR "${VULKAN_DIR}/include")
set(VULKAN_LIB_DIR "${VULKAN_DIR}/lib")
set(VULKAN_LIB "${VULKAN_LIB_DIR}/vulkan-1.lib")

set(SHADERC_INCLUDE_DIR "${VENDOR_DIR}/shaderc/libshaderc/include")
set(SHADERC_SKIP_TESTS ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SHADERC_SKIP_EXAMPLES ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SHADERC_SKIP_COPYRIGHT_CHECK ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SHADERC_ENABLE_SHARED_CRT ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SHADERC_SPIRV_HEADERS_DIR "${VULKAN_INCLUDE_DIR}/spirv-headers")
set(SHADERC_SPIRV_TOOLS_DIR "${VULKAN_INCLUDE_DIR}/spirv-tools")

if(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE STREQUAL "Debug")
	set(SPIRV_CROSS_LIB "${VULKAN_LIB_DIR}/spirv-cross-cored.lib")
else()
	set(SPIRV_CROSS_LIB "${VULKAN_LIB_DIR}/spirv-cross-core.lib")
endif()


if (NOT DEFINED VENDOR_NO_PARENT)
	set(GLM_INCLUDE_DIR ${GLM_INCLUDE_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(GLFW_INCLUDE_DIR ${GLFW_INCLUDE_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(IMGUI_INCLUDE_DIR ${IMGUI_INCLUDE_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(GLAD_INCLUDE_DIR ${GLAD_INCLUDE_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(OPENGL_LIB ${OPENGL_LIB} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(TRACY_INCLUDE_DIR ${TRACY_INCLUDE_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(ENGINE_INCLUDE_DIR ${ENGINE_INCLUDE_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(ASSIMP_INCLUDE_DIR ${ASSIMP_INCLUDE_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(ASSIMP_LIB ${ASSIMP_LIB} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(ASSIMP_DLL_NAME ${ASSIMP_DLL_NAME} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(ASSIMP_DLL ${ASSIMP_DLL} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(GTEST_INCLUDE_DIR ${GTEST_INCLUDE_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(BULLET_INCLUDE_DIR ${BULLET_INCLUDE_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(BULLET_LIB_DIR ${BULLET_LIB_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(BULLET_COLLISION_LIB ${BULLET_COLLISION_LIB} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(BULLET_DYNAMICS_LIB ${BULLET_DYNAMICS_LIB} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(BULLET_MATH_LIB ${BULLET_MATH_LIB} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(VULKAN_DIR ${VULKAN_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(VULKAN_INCLUDE_DIR ${VULKAN_INCLUDE_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(VULKAN_LIB_DIR ${VULKAN_LIB_DIR} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(VULKAN_LIB ${VULKAN_LIB} PARENT_SCOPE)
	set(SPIRV_CROSS_LIB ${SPIRV_CROSS_LIB} PARENT_SCOPE)
endif()
